title: Missing un-minified source code
summary: Minified CSS or JS files were detected without their completely human-readable .src equivalents, violating open source policies.

guidance.why_it_matters: WordPress demands human-readable code. If you bundle a compiled/minified asset, you MUST include the original raw unminified source code alongside it.
guidance.fix: Ensure that your build process outputs both the compiled .min.js/.min.css file AND includes the raw .js/.css file in the submitted plugin archive.
guidance.false_positive_risk: Medium. Third-party vendor bundles often omit sourcemaps and raw JS.
